**Proposal Summary**
Brief description of the proposed A2A binding.

**Motivation**
Why is this binding needed? What problem does it solve?

**Technical Details**
Detailed description of the binding implementation.

**Compatibility**
How does this affect existing A2A implementations?

**Additional context**
Any other relevant information.
